languages.text: {n}Плотное кольцо людей окружают подвешенную на цепи платформу. Вопреки ожидаемому, никто не кричит, подбадривая вас или полковника. В мрачном, торжественном молчании меровцы не сводят взгляд с вас и Батошски, вооруженных традиционными ножами.{/n}

{n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. No one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Плотное кольцо людей окружают подвешенную на цепи платформу. Вопреки ожидаемому, никто не кричит, подбадривая вас или полковника. В мрачном, торжественном молчании меровцы не сводят взгляд с вас и Батошски, вооруженных традиционными ножами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A dense ring of people surrounds the platform suspended on chains. Contrary to what you might expect, no one shouts out encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

{n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. Contrary to what you might expect, no one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

{n}A dense ring of people surrounds you, forming an impromptu arena. Contrary to what you might expect, no one shouts out encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

{n}A dense ring of people surrounds the platform suspended on chains. Contrary to what you might expect, no one shouts out encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

{n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. Contrary to what you might expect, no one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

{n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. No one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたを取り囲む人々がぎっしりと輪を作り、即席の闘技場ができあがる。予想に反して、あなたにも大佐にも、誰一人として声援を送らない。陰鬱で厳かな沈黙の中、伝統のナイフを手にしたメロヴィアンたちは、あなたとバトシュスキーから目を離さない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dense ring of people surrounds you, forming an impromptu arena. Contrary to what you might expect, no one shouts out encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたを取り囲む人々がぎっしりと輪を作り、即席の闘技場ができあがる。予想に反して、あなたにも大佐にも、誰一人として声援を送らない。陰鬱で厳かな沈黙の中、伝統のナイフを手にしたメロヴィアンたちは、あなたとバトシュスキーから目を離さない。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les spectateurs forment un cercle serré autour d'une plateforme suspendue par des chaînes. Aucun ne crie d'encouragement pour vous soutenir, vous ou le colonel. Dans un silence lugubre et solennel, les Meroviens gardent leurs yeux braqués sur vous et Batoshski alors que vous vous apprêtez à combattre, armés de couteaux traditionnels.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. No one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les spectateurs forment un cercle serré autour d'une plateforme suspendue par des chaînes. Aucun ne crie d'encouragement pour vous soutenir, vous ou le colonel. Dans un silence lugubre et solennel, les Meroviens gardent leurs yeux braqués sur vous et Batoshski alors que vous vous apprêtez à combattre, armés de couteaux traditionnels.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir insan çemberi, zincirlerle asılı duran platformun etrafını sarıyor. Kimse sana ya da albaya tezahürat yapmıyor. Merovlular, ağır ve kasvetli bir sessizlik içinde geleneksel bıçaklar kuşanmış sana ve Batoshski'ye bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. No one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir insan çemberi, zincirlerle asılı duran platformun etrafını sarıyor. Kimse sana ya da albaya tezahürat yapmıyor. Merovlular, ağır ve kasvetli bir sessizlik içinde geleneksel bıçaklar kuşanmış sana ve Batoshski'ye bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein dichter Ring von Personen steht um eine an Ketten schwebende Plattform herum. Niemand erhebt das Wort, um dich oder den Colonel anzufeuern. In feierlicher Stille richten die Merovianer ihre Augen auf dich und den ebenfalls mit einem traditionellen Messer bewaffneten Batoshski.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. No one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein dichter Ring von Personen steht um eine an Ketten schwebende Plattform herum. Niemand erhebt das Wort, um dich oder den Colonel anzufeuern. In feierlicher Stille richten die Merovianer ihre Augen auf dich und den ebenfalls mit einem traditionellen Messer bewaffneten Batoshski.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un denso anillo de personas rodea una plataforma suspendida mediante cadenas. Nadie grita su apoyo, ni a ti ni al coronel. Los merovianos guardan un silencio oscuro y solemne mientras os observan a ti y a Batoshski, armados con cuchillos tradicionales.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. No one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un denso anillo de personas rodea una plataforma suspendida mediante cadenas. Nadie grita su apoyo, ni a ti ni al coronel. Los merovianos guardan un silencio oscuro y solemne mientras os observan a ti y a Batoshski, armados con cuchillos tradicionales.{/n}

languages.text: {n}层层叠叠的人群围住了那个由铁链吊起的平台。无人为你或上校呐喊助威。梅罗夫人庄严肃穆地沉默着，将目光锁定在手持传统刀具的你和巴托什斯基身上。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. No one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}
